layout:
```json
{
  "grid": {
    "template": "minmax(280px, 340px) 1fr minmax(0, 320px)",
    "gap": "0px"
  },
  "sidebar": {
    "minWidth": 280,
    "defaultWidth": 340,
    "maxWidth": 480,
    "sections": [
      "antenna-type",
      "geometry-parameters", 
      "frequency-settings",
      "boundary-conditions",
      "mesh-settings",
      "optimization"
    ]
  },
  "main_area": {
    "tabs": [
      "3D Viewport",
      "S-Parameters", 
      "VSWR",
      "Smith Chart",
      "Radiation Pattern",
      "Current Distribution",
      "Results Table"
    ],
    "chart_grid": "repeat(auto-fit, minmax(400px, 1fr))",
    "viewport_allocation": "60%"
  },
  "panel_dimensions": {
    "headerHeight": 48,
    "footerHeight": 32,
    "sectionHeaderHeight": 36,
    "contentPadding": 16,
    "tabHeight": 40,
    "toolbarHeight": 44
  },
  "resize": {
    "dividerWidth": 4,
    "snapPoints": [280, 340, 420, 480],
    "minWidths": {
      "sidebar": 280,
      "main": 600,
      "inspector": 250
    }
  },
  "breakpoints": {
    "sm": 768,
    "md": 1024, 
    "lg": 1280,
    "xl": 1536,
    "sidebar_collapse": 1024,
    "inspector_hide": 1280
  },
  "z_index": {
    "base": 0,
    "panels": 10,
    "dividers": 15,
    "overlays": 20,
    "dropdowns": 25,
    "modals": 30,
    "tooltips": 35,
    "toasts": 40
  }
}
```
